movesList.name: Dashing Jump
inputs: press up-forward while dashing or running

movesList.name: Safe Fall
inputs: press any button when you hit the ground

movesList.name: Throw / Crouching Throw
inputs: press ab when standing or crouching

movesList.name: Throw From Behind
inputs: press ab when standing behind your enemy

movesList.name: Get-Up and Flip Away
inputs: press b when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Get-Up and Roll Forward
inputs: press u or f when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Quick Get-Up
inputs: press d when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Roll into Background
inputs: press m when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Roll into Foreground
inputs: m when lying on the ground

movesList.name: Strong Pursuit Attack
inputs: a / b when enemy is downed

movesList.name: Fuyuu
inputs: press provocation  (can then move b / f)

movesList.name: Kuuchuu Yoku Idou
inputs: hold g during fuyuu  (can move in / out)

movesList.name: Calamity Dive
inputs: press a / b / K during fuyuu

movesList.name: Gamo Giant Swing
inputs: K when foe's back is towards you

movesList.name: Gamo Fall
inputs: press b during gamo running kick

movesList.name: Gamo Swing
inputs: press a / b / K and miss

movesList.name: Gamo Home Run
inputs: press a / b / K with good timing

movesList.name: Gamo Chip
inputs: press a / b / K with bad timing

movesList.name: Zettai Ansei
inputs: then do any move listed below

movesList.name: Haikotsu Shinchou
inputs: K  (then hold d for zettai ansei)

movesList.name: Mad Blit
inputs: move b / f at apex of jump

movesList.name: Last Shooting
inputs: press a after throwing foe from behind
